title: lauro-cerasus undulata f. elongata
intro: Lauro-cerasus undulata f. elongata, also known as a cultivar of the cherry laurel plant, is a specific variety of the Prunus laurocerasus species that is characterized by its elongated leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties due to the presence of prussic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Lauro-cerasus undulata f. elongata are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
